projectDescription: Botky is a WordPress plugin that gives UChat partners a branded dashboard to create and manage client workspaces, control plans and add-ons, handle billing via a built-in wallet, and top up balances through Stripe.
keyFeatures: Workspace management — create, suspend, delete, and search UChat workspaces from a single panel
Client directory — browse and search all partner clients with contact details
Built-in wallet — pre-funded balance that auto-deducts on plan changes and add-on purchases
Stripe top-ups — secure one-click balance top-ups processed by Stripe
Plan & add-on management — change workspace plans and toggle add-ons (bots, members, users, webhooks, custom domain, tickets)
Points management — top up or deduct workspace points directly from the dashboard
Custom pricing — per-user configurable prices for all plans and add-ons
Bilingual UI — full Spanish and English support driven by WordPress locale
Shortcode embed — display the partner panel anywhere on a WordPress site with [botky_panel]
WordPress admin panel — native admin menu entry for super-admin access
publicApiSurface: AJAX action: i360_save_settings — save Partner API token
AJAX action: i360_get_workspace_details — fetch single workspace details
AJAX action: i360_create_workspace — create a new UChat workspace
AJAX action: i360_delete_workspace — delete a workspace
AJAX action: i360_change_status — activate or suspend a workspace
AJAX action: i360_get_plans — list available plans with calculated prices
AJAX action: i360_change_plan — switch a workspace to a different plan
AJAX action: i360_get_addons — list available add-ons with partner prices
AJAX action: i360_manage_addon — add or remove an add-on from a workspace
AJAX action: i360_manage_points — top up or deduct workspace points
AJAX action: i360_get_clients — list/search partner clients (paginated)
REST endpoint: POST /wp-json/i360/v1/stripe-webhook — Stripe checkout webhook
